description:
I need to set up a secure artifact manager environment for binary repositories. As part of this task, I need to ensure that the binary directory `/home/user/artifacts/binaries` is only accessible to the user `artifactmgr` and its contents have the correct permissions to be readable and executable by this user. Furthermore, a new subdirectory called `trusted` should be created inside `/home/user/artifacts/binaries`, with permissions only allowing the owner `artifactmgr` to read, write, and execute. 

To confirm the changes were made correctly, I want you to create a log file at `/home/user/artifacts/permissions_log.txt` that contains a detailed listing of the directory `/home/user/artifacts/binaries` and its subdirectories. The output in the log file should clearly show the correct ownership and permissions for each entry. Only entries for `/home/user/artifacts/binaries` and `/home/user/artifacts/binaries/trusted` should appear in the log, and the file must be readable only by `artifactmgr`.

Your task is to configure the permissions correctly and generate this log in the specified format and location. The artifact manager process will be using these settings for repository access, so correctness is crucial for security. Make sure the ownership of all files and directories is set to `artifactmgr`.
truth:
The directory `/home/user/artifacts/binaries` must exist and be owned by the user `artifactmgr`. It must have permissions set to `750`, allowing the owner to read, write, and execute; others in the group to read and execute; and no access for others.

        A subdirectory `/home/user/artifacts/binaries/trusted` must also be owned by `artifactmgr` and have permissions set to `700`, allowing only the owner to read, write, and execute.

        The file `/home/user/artifacts/permissions_log.txt` must exist and be readable and writable only by `artifactmgr` (permissions `600`). It must contain the following exact output:

        drwxr-x--- 2 artifactmgr artifactmgr 4096 Jan  1 00:00 binaries
        drwx------ 2 artifactmgr artifactmgr 4096 Jan  1 00:00 binaries/trusted

        No other directories or files should be modified in this process. Any other processes or prior configurations should not interfere with the ownership and permissions of these locations.
name: task_000000_6eba56f8
